title: heterotheca hirsuta
intro: Heterotheca hirsuta, also known as hairy false goldeneye or hairy micropappus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Heterotheca hirsuta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the dried leaves and flowers often used in herbal remedies.
